TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2018 CHEVROLET SILVERADO 1500. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 25 MPH, THE VEHICLE STALLED WITHOUT WARNING. THE VEHICLE WAS ABLE TO RESTART. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER (LAKE CHEVROLET, 31201 AUTO CENTER DR, LAKE ELSINORE, CA 92530) WHERE IT WAS EXPLAIN

VEHICLES ENGINE AND IGNITION SHUT OFF WHILE TURNING RIGHT. ENGINE CAN BE RESTARTED IMMEDIATELY. THIS HAS OCCURRED 3 TIMES IN 3 WEEKS (1090 MILES) UNEXPECTEDLY WHILE TRAVELING AT LOW SPEED. ONE TIME WHILE ENTERING A ROADWAY FROM A PARKING LOT, ONE TIME WHILE PULLING OVER TO PARK A

THE BRAKE PEDDLE WENT SOLID HARD AND LOSS OF BRAKING HAPPENED WHILE BACKING A BOAT TRAILER DOWN A BOAT LAUNCH RAMP.  WHEN THE BRAKES FAILED THE DASH FLASHED SERVICE BRAKE ASSIST. LOSS OF POWER BRAKES CAUSED THE TRUCK TO NOT STOP EVEN WITH PUSHING DOWN ON THE PEDDLE AS HARD AS POS

narrative.headline: 2018 Chevrolet Silverado 1500: power train tops owner complaints
narrative.summary: The most-reported problems center on the power train, with owners describing sudden loss of power steering accompanied by dashboard warnings and the vehicle becoming immobile. Electrical, engine, and service brake complaints are each nearly as common, and together they paint a pattern of unexpected shutdowns and loss of critical assist systems while driving at low speeds. Several complaint categories include reports of fires and crashes, indicating that some incidents escalated beyond warning lights alone.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle becoming unable to move after startup, with the dashboard displaying a low steering assist warning, loss of power steering, and traction control lights illuminating simultaneously. · 1 crash · 2 injured

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2018 CHEVROLET SILVERADO 1500. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 25 MPH, THE VEHICLE STALLED WITHOUT WARNING. THE VEHICLE WAS ABLE TO RESTART. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER (LAKE CHEVROLET, 31201 AUTO CENTER DR, LAKE ELSINORE, CA 92530) WHERE IT WAS EXPLAIN
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle stalling without warning while in motion, though in some cases the engine can be restarted immediately afterward. · 2 fire · 1 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the engine and ignition shutting off unexpectedly during low-speed maneuvers such as turning, with the engine able to restart immediately, and the event recurring multiple times over a short period. · 2 fire

issues.sample: THE BRAKE PEDDLE WENT SOLID HARD AND LOSS OF BRAKING HAPPENED WHILE BACKING A BOAT TRAILER DOWN A BOAT LAUNCH RAMP.  WHEN THE BRAKES FAILED THE DASH FLASHED SERVICE BRAKE ASSIST. LOSS OF POWER BRAKES CAUSED THE TRUCK TO NOT STOP EVEN WITH PUSHING DOWN ON THE PEDDLE AS HARD AS POS
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report the brake pedal going hard and unresponsive, resulting in loss of braking ability, with the dashboard displaying a service brake assist warning during the failure. · 1 fire · 3 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: 41 complaints (8%), with 3 crashes. Owners report a low-steering-assist warning and loss of power steering.
